_metadata.description: Character appearance seed data for Unicron Trilogy — Armada, Energon, Cybertron cartoons

data.name: Rad White (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Caucasian boy with spiky brown hair and blue eyes, typically wearing a red and white t-shirt with cargo shorts. Energetic build reflecting his adventurous personality.

data.name: Carlos Lopez (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Latino boy with dark skin and black hair styled in a short ponytail, wearing a yellow and green shirt. Athletic build and often seen on his skateboard.

data.name: Alexis Thi Dang (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Asian-American girl with short brown hair and large eyes, typically wearing a pink and white top with a skirt. Carries a laptop computer and is the most tech-savvy of the trio.

data.name: High Wire (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small blue and silver Mini-Con with a compact humanoid form. Transforms into a BMX bicycle with visible wheel elements on the robot mode legs.

data.name: Grindor (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small green and gray Mini-Con with skateboard deck elements visible on the back. Compact robot form with wide-set feet for stability.

data.name: Sureshock (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small orange and white Mini-Con with a moped-derived robot form. Wheel elements visible on the legs, compact and agile proportions.

data.name: Perceptor (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Combined robot form of the Street Action Mini-Con Team. Taller than the individual Mini-Cons, with elements of High Wire, Grindor, and Sureshock visible in the merged body. Blue, green, and orange color scheme.

data.name: Optimus Prime (Armada Cartoon)
data.description: Red and blue cab-over semi truck robot with broad shoulders and a traditional silver faceplate. Features a large flat-fronted chest from the cab-over truck cab and prominent smokestacks on the shoulders.

data.name: Optimus Prime (Energon Cartoon)
data.description: Redesigned with a longnose semi truck alternate mode, giving a more angular chest with visible truck grille. Red, blue, and white color scheme with more prominent shoulder armor and a sleeker overall silhouette than the Armada design.

data.name: Optimus Prime (Cybertron Cartoon)
data.description: Fire truck-inspired design with a broader, more heroic frame. Red and blue color scheme with prominent ladder and emergency vehicle elements integrated into the shoulders and back. Features the Omega Lock on his forearm.

data.name: Hot Shot (Armada Cartoon)
data.description: Bright yellow sports car robot with a youthful, athletic build. Features a prominent car hood chest, blue eyes, and a spoiler on the back. Compact proportions reflecting his young-warrior characterization.

data.name: Hot Shot (Energon Cartoon)
data.description: Redesigned yellow sports car robot with significantly different proportions. Bulkier build with broader shoulders and a restyled car hood chest. Retains the yellow color scheme but with a more mature, armored appearance.

data.name: Red Alert (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: White and red robot with ambulance/SUV elements. Broad-shouldered medic with a visor and medical cross insignia. Features roof-mounted light bar elements on the shoulders.

data.name: Smokescreen (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and orange Cybertronic crane truck robot with a sturdy, heavily armored frame. Features crane arm elements on the back and a confident, wide stance.

data.name: Hoist (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Green and yellow Cybertronic excavator robot, Smokescreen's rebuilt body. Bulkier and more heavily armored than Smokescreen with prominent excavator bucket elements on the arms.

data.name: Scavenger (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Large green and brown front-end loader robot with a massive, powerful frame. Features bulldozer blade elements on the forearms and a grizzled, battle-worn appearance befitting a veteran warrior.

data.name: Blurr (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Sleek blue and white race car robot with an aerodynamic frame. Features a prominent visor and streamlined limbs emphasizing speed. Tall and lean proportions.

data.name: Side Swipe (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Red sports car robot with a youthful, athletic build. Features a prominent car hood chest with Nissan-inspired styling cues and door-wing elements on the back.

data.name: Jetfire (Armada Cartoon)
data.description: White and red space shuttle robot with a tall, imposing frame. Features shuttle wing elements on the back, a visor, and prominent booster elements on the legs. Can combine with Optimus Prime.

data.name: Jetfire (Energon Cartoon)
data.description: Redesigned white shuttle robot with a significantly different body shape. Sleeker proportions with a more streamlined cockpit chest and restyled wing configuration. Retains white color scheme with red and blue accents.

data.name: Overload (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Red and gray Cybertronic weapons trailer robot with a massive, blocky frame. Features heavy artillery visible across the body and can combine with Optimus Prime for the Megaweapon mode.

data.name: Laserbeak (Armada Cartoon)
data.description: Small red and gold robotic bird with camera and laser gun alternate modes. Streamlined avian form with sharp beak and angular wing design. Autobot drone with a compact, lightweight frame.

data.name: Sparkplug (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small red Mini-Con with a sleek Lamborghini Diablo-derived robot form. Low-slung proportions with prominent sports car elements including the car roof on the chest.

data.name: Jolt (Armada Cartoon)
data.description: Small blue and white Mini-Con with helicopter rotor blades on the back. Compact humanoid form with a round head and visor. Helicopter tail elements visible on the legs.

data.name: Longarm (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small white and orange Mini-Con with hook-crane truck elements. Features a crane arm on the back and a compact, functional robot mode with wide feet.

data.name: Comettor (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small gray and blue Mini-Con with Cybertronic moon buggy elements. Features large wheels on the legs and a wide-set, low-profile robot mode designed for lunar exploration.

data.name: Megatron (Armada Cartoon)
data.description: Green, purple, and gray tank robot with a menacing, angular frame. Features a massive cannon barrel on the right arm, tank treads on the legs, and a horned helmet. Imposing and heavily armored build.

data.name: Galvatron (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Megatron's upgraded form with enhanced purple and silver armor. Retains tank elements but with a more powerful, imposing silhouette and upgraded weaponry. Larger horns and more angular helmet design.

data.name: Starscream (Armada Cartoon)
data.description: Red and white fighter jet robot with a tall, lean frame. Features prominent jet wings on the back, air intakes on the chest, and a distinctive crown-like helmet. Red is the dominant color with white accents.

data.name: Starscream (Energon Cartoon)
data.description: Ghost/resurrected form with a dramatically different dark color scheme. Black and gray body with translucent ghostly elements and glowing red accents. Retains jet elements but with a spectral, ethereal quality.

data.name: Starscream (Cybertron Cartoon)
data.description: Primus-empowered form with a regal, enlarged design. Silver and purple color scheme with an ornate crown and massive wings. Grown to enormous size after absorbing the power of Primus, towering over other Transformers.

data.name: Demolishor (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Brown and tan missile tank robot with a stocky, powerful build. Features missile launchers on the shoulders and tank treads on the legs. Broad-chested and heavily armored with a flat-topped head.

data.name: Cyclonus (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Purple and gray helicopter robot with rotor blades on the back. Lean, aerodynamic frame with a wild-eyed expression and angular helmet. Helicopter tail boom visible along one arm.

data.name: Thrust (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Dark green and black fighter jet robot with a calculating, sinister design. Features angular jet wings swept back, a conical head with a visor, and Lockheed Martin X-35-inspired fuselage elements on the torso.

data.name: Tidal Wave (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Massive dark purple and gray triple warship robot. Enormous frame composed of three combined naval vessels with flight deck elements, gun turrets, and a towering, broad silhouette dwarfing most other Transformers.

data.name: Wheeljack (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: White and red supercar robot with a sleek, aerodynamic frame. Features Ferrari F50-style bodywork elements on the chest and doors as wing elements. Sports car spoiler visible on the back.

data.name: Leader-1 (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small dark gray and purple Mini-Con with a Cybertronic buggy alternate mode. Compact, hunched robot form with an oppressed, weary appearance reflecting his forced servitude to Megatron.

data.name: Swindle (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small yellow and black Mini-Con with an Indy-style race car alternate mode. Sleek, low-profile robot form with prominent front wing elements on the chest and oversized rear wheels on the legs.

data.name: Blackout (Mini-Con) (Armada Cartoon)
data.description: Small dark green Mini-Con with a six-wheeled APC/anti-aircraft vehicle mode. Boxy, utilitarian robot form with multiple wheel elements and a no-nonsense military aesthetic.

data.name: Crumplezone (Mini-Con) (Armada Cartoon)
data.description: Small dark gray and brown Mini-Con with a tank alternate mode. Compact, squat robot form with tank turret elements on the shoulder and treads visible on the legs.

data.name: Inferno (Mini-Con) (Armada Cartoon)
data.description: Small red and gray Mini-Con with a missile truck alternate mode. Compact robot form with missile rack elements visible on the back and a military-styled aesthetic.

data.name: Jetstorm (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small white and blue Mini-Con with a Concorde SST jet alternate mode. Sleek robot form with delta wing elements on the back and a pointed, aerodynamic head design.

data.name: Runway (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small gray and red Mini-Con with a Boeing Sonic Cruiser jet alternate mode. Compact robot form with swept-forward wing elements and a distinctive canard-style head crest.

data.name: Sonar (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small white and orange Mini-Con with a VentureStar shuttle alternate mode. Broad-shouldered robot form with shuttle body elements forming the torso and lifting body wing sections on the back.

data.name: Star Saber (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Large golden energy sword formed by the combination of the Air Defense Mini-Con Team. Glowing blade with intricate hilt design, one of the three legendary Mini-Con weapons capable of immense destructive power.

data.name: Dirt Boss (Mini-Con) (Armada Cartoon)
data.description: Small blue and white Mini-Con with a Volkswagen Lupo rally car alternate mode. Compact robot form with rally car body panels on the chest and oversized rear wheel arches on the shoulders.

data.name: Downshift (Mini-Con) (Armada Cartoon)
data.description: Small red and silver Mini-Con with a race car alternate mode. Low-slung robot form with prominent hood scoop elements on the chest and racing livery details.

data.name: Mirage (Mini-Con) (Armada Cartoon)
data.description: Small yellow and blue Mini-Con with a race car alternate mode. Sleek robot form with aerodynamic bodywork elements and a visor-style face.

data.name: Skyboom Shield (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Large circular energy shield formed by the combination of the Race Mini-Con Team. Translucent green defensive barrier with intricate circuit-like patterns, one of the three legendary Mini-Con weapons.

data.name: Astroscope (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small white and blue Mini-Con with a space station alternate mode. Angular robot form with satellite dish elements on the shoulders and a scientific instrument aesthetic.

data.name: Payload (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small orange and white Mini-Con with a rocket transport truck alternate mode. Stocky robot form with cargo bed elements on the back and heavy-duty truck wheel sections on the legs.

data.name: Sky Blast (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small white and red Mini-Con with a Vostok-style rocket alternate mode. Tall, narrow robot form with rocket fuselage elements forming the torso and fins on the back.

data.name: Requiem Blaster (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Massive energy cannon formed by the combination of the Space Mini-Con Team. Long-barreled weapon with a multi-stage rocket aesthetic and devastating firepower, the most destructive of the three legendary Mini-Con weapons.

data.name: Sideways (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Purple and black racing motorcycle robot with a dual-faced head representing both Autobot and Decepticon allegiances. Lean, agile frame with motorcycle fairing elements on the chest and wheel on the back.

data.name: Rook (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small dark purple Mini-Con affiliated with Unicron. One of Sideways' two head partners, forming one face of Sideways' dual-faced head when deployed.

data.name: Crosswise (Mini-Con) (Armada Cartoon)
data.description: Small dark blue Mini-Con affiliated with Unicron. One of Sideways' two head partners, forming the other face of Sideways' dual-faced head when deployed.

data.name: Unicron (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Planet-sized Transformer with an immense orange, gray, and brown spherical planet mode featuring a massive ring structure. Robot mode is colossal with horned helmet, glowing orange eyes, and planet segments forming the torso and limbs.

data.name: Nemesis Prime (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Dark counterpart of Optimus Prime with a black, teal, and gray color scheme. Longnose truck cab robot with a sinister, corrupted version of Optimus Prime's design featuring red eyes and Unicron-derived dark energy markings.

data.name: Run-Over (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small black and teal Mini-Con, a dark clone of Sparkplug created by Unicron. Nearly identical to Sparkplug in body shape but with an inverted dark color scheme and mindless demeanor.

data.name: Billy (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Caucasian boy with blond hair and a stocky build. Former bully who wears a red cap and casual clothing. Larger and taller than Rad's group.

data.name: Fred (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Heavyset boy with dark hair and glasses, wearing a green shirt. Known for his constant snacking and comic relief personality. Billy's companion.

data.name: Kicker Jones (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Teenage boy with spiky brown hair wearing a specialized energon-sensing exosuit. The suit is white and blue with a helmet that glows when detecting energon deposits. Athletic build with a defiant posture.

data.name: Alpha Quintesson (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Mysterious entity with multiple rotating faces on a spherical head, each expressing different emotions. Floats without a visible body, surrounded by a dark cloak-like shroud. Quintesson design with tentacle-like appendages.

data.name: Ironhide (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and gray pickup truck robot with a young, eager appearance. Compact and stocky frame with truck bed elements on the back and oversized fists. Youthful face design reflecting his rookie status.

data.name: Scorponok (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Large green and brown scorpion-shaped construction vehicle robot. Features massive pincer claws, a segmented tail with a stinger weapon, and heavy treaded legs. Imposing and heavily armored build.

data.name: Wing Saber (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: White and red Cybertronic flying wing jet robot with massive swept-back wings. Tall and heroic proportions with prominent wing elements forming a cape-like silhouette. Can combine with Optimus Prime for enhanced aerial combat.

data.name: Omega Supreme (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Massive yellow, red, and gray robot that transforms into both a Cybertronian train and a space battleship. Towering guardian frame with train track elements and heavy cannon weaponry. One of the largest Autobots.

data.name: Rodimus (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Black and red rocket-powered Cybertronic truck robot with a rugged, battle-hardened appearance. Features flame-like design elements, a stern face, and heavy armor plating. Longnose truck cab chest with rocket boosters on the back.

data.name: Prowl (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: White and black Cybertronic police racer robot with a sleek, analytical design. Features police light bar elements on the shoulders, a visor, and streamlined proportions emphasizing speed and precision.

data.name: Landmine (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Green and tan Cybertronic half-track vehicle robot with a battle-scarred, experienced warrior look. Features half-track treads on the legs, heavy shoulder armor, and a rugged, no-nonsense design.

data.name: Bulkhead (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Green and gray Cybertronic assault helicopter robot with a rotund, heavily armored frame. Features helicopter rotor blades on the back, a broad chest, and a grizzled older appearance with thick limbs.

data.name: Cliffjumper (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Red and silver baja-style buggy robot with a compact, agile frame. Features oversized off-road wheels on the legs, roll cage elements on the shoulders, and a daring, thrill-seeker aesthetic.

data.name: Downshift (Energon Cartoon)
data.description: Yellow and black sports car robot with a lean, agile frame. Features a car hood chest with air intake elements, door panels as arm shields, and a mature, serious expression reflecting his growth from rookie to veteran.

data.name: Inferno (Energon Cartoon)
data.description: Red and white Cybertronic fire truck robot with a sturdy build. Features water cannon elements on the arms, fire truck ladder sections on the back, and emergency light bar elements on the shoulders.

data.name: Arcee (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Pink and white motorcycle robot with a sleek, feminine design. Features motorcycle wheel elements on the back, a bow weapon, and Omnicon energon-crafting tools. Compact and agile proportions.

data.name: Signal Flare (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Orange and white Cybertronic half-track MASER tank robot with a sturdy Omnicon design. Features a large radar/MASER dish on one arm, half-track elements on the legs, and energon-sculpting tools.

data.name: Skyblast (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and white Cybertronic jet robot with a compact Omnicon design. Features jet wing elements on the back, a visor, and energon chip conversion tools. Streamlined and tactical in appearance.

data.name: Strongarm (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Green and tan Cybertronic off-road jeep robot with a rugged Omnicon design. Features large off-road wheels on the legs, a broad chest, and energon-mining tools. Sturdy, worker-oriented proportions.

data.name: Shockblast (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Purple and gray Cybertronic laser-tank robot with a single glowing eye and a cannon replacing one arm. Tall and menacing with satellite cannon elements on the back. Design evokes G1 Shockwave with updated proportions.

data.name: Six Shot (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Dark purple and teal Cybertronic laser-tank robot similar to Shockblast but with a different head design and secondary color accents. Features the same single-eye motif but with a more compact, engineer-like frame.

data.name: Mirage (Energon Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and white assault speedboat robot with a sleek, aquatic-themed design. Features boat hull elements on the chest, hydrofoil wings on the back, and a visor. Streamlined and precision-oriented proportions.

data.name: Snow Cat (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: White and blue all-terrain tracked vehicle robot with a bulky, cold-weather-adapted frame. Features caterpillar treads on the legs, a reinforced chest, and a wild, aggressive expression.

data.name: Battle Ravage (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Black and silver robotic predatory cat with a sleek, feline frame. Four-legged beast mode with energon-enhanced jaws and claws, glowing red eyes, and segmented metallic armor plating along the spine.

data.name: Divebomb (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Brown and gold robotic hawk with sharp talons and angular wing design. Features energon-enhanced razor blades along the wings and a predatory beak. Sleek aerial beast mode built for speed.

data.name: Cruellock (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Dark green and brown dinosaur-monster creature with massive jaws and powerful legs. Features energon-enhanced teeth and claws, a thick armored hide, and a savage, predatory stance.

data.name: Insecticon (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Green and black robotic rhinoceros beetle with a heavily armored carapace. Features large mandibles, six segmented legs, and energon-devouring mouth parts. Compact and swarming drone design.

data.name: Constructicon Maximus (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Massive green and yellow combined robot formed from the five Construction Team members. Imposing gestalt frame with construction vehicle elements throughout — shovel arm, crane arm, loader legs. Towering over standard-sized Transformers.

data.name: Steamhammer (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Green and gray steam shovel robot with a compact, sturdy frame. Features a large excavator bucket arm and treaded lower body. Forms the torso of Constructicon Maximus.

data.name: Bonecrusher (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Yellow and green wheeled front-end loader robot with a compact build. Features a front-end loader bucket on the chest and large wheels on the legs. Forms the left leg of Constructicon Maximus.

data.name: Duststorm (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Orange and gray mobile crane robot with a tall crane boom element on the back. Lean frame with heavy-lifting crane mechanisms visible throughout. Forms the left arm of Constructicon Maximus.

data.name: Sledge (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Brown and yellow wheeled front-end loader robot similar to Bonecrusher but with different color distribution. Compact frame with loader bucket elements. Forms the right arm of Constructicon Maximus.

data.name: Wideload (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Dark green and brown mobile crane robot with a weathered, ancient appearance. Similar crane boom elements to Duststorm but with a more battle-worn aesthetic. Forms the right leg of Constructicon Maximus.

data.name: Bruticus Maximus (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Massive dark purple and black combined robot formed from the five Destruction Team members. Menacing gestalt frame with military vehicle elements — helicopter rotors, tank turrets, and APC armor plating. Super-energon-powered with a glowing aura.

data.name: Barricade (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Dark blue and gray eight-wheeled APC robot with a heavily armored frame. Features multiple wheel sets on the legs, a broad chest from the APC hull, and a commanding stance. Forms the torso of Bruticus Maximus.

data.name: Blackout (Energon Cartoon)
data.description: Dark green and gray assault helicopter robot with rotor blades on the back. Muscular frame with helicopter fuselage elements on the chest. Super-energon-powered. Forms the left arm of Bruticus Maximus.

data.name: Blight (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Tan and dark green anti-aircraft tank robot with twin cannon barrels on the shoulders. Stocky frame with tank treads on the legs and heavy armor plating. Super-energon-powered. Forms the right arm of Bruticus Maximus.

data.name: Kickback (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Dark purple and tan anti-aircraft tank robot with twin cannon barrels. Similar build to Blight but with a different color scheme and head design. Super-energon-powered. Forms the left leg of Bruticus Maximus.

data.name: Stormcloud (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Dark gray and teal assault helicopter robot similar to Blackout but with different coloring and head design. Helicopter rotor elements on the back with a compact military frame. Super-energon-powered. Forms the right leg of Bruticus Maximus.

data.name: Superion Maximus (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Massive white and blue combined robot formed from the five Air Team members. Aerial gestalt frame with jet wings and fuselage elements throughout. Streamlined proportions emphasizing aerial superiority.

data.name: Storm Jet (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: White and dark blue SR-71 Blackbird-style jet robot with a broad-chested, brawler frame. Features delta wing elements on the back and twin engine nacelle shoulders. Forms the torso of Superion Maximus.

data.name: Sky Shadow (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Dark green and gray A-10 Thunderbolt II jet robot with a compact military frame. Features straight wing elements and twin engine pods. Forms the right leg of Superion Maximus.

data.name: Terradive (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Tan and brown A-10 Thunderbolt II jet robot similar to Sky Shadow but with desert camouflage coloring. Straight wing elements and twin engine pods. Forms the left arm of Superion Maximus.

data.name: Treadshot (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Gray and red F-22 Raptor-style jet robot with a sleek, angular frame. Features swept-back wing elements and stealth fighter design cues. Forms the right arm of Superion Maximus.

data.name: Windrazor (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and white F-22 Raptor-style jet robot similar to Treadshot but with a different color scheme. Swept-back stealth wing elements and angular proportions. Forms the left leg of Superion Maximus.

data.name: Dr. Brian Jones (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Middle-aged Caucasian man with graying brown hair and glasses, wearing a white lab coat over business attire. Scholarly appearance befitting an energon research scientist.

data.name: Misha Miramond (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Young woman with long blonde hair and blue eyes, wearing a research uniform. Slim build with a composed, professional demeanor. Kicker's romantic interest.

data.name: Miranda Jones (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Middle-aged woman with brown hair styled in a bob and gentle features. Wears casual domestic clothing. Calm and maternal appearance.

data.name: Sally Jones (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Young girl with brown hair in pigtails and a cheerful expression. Wears colorful casual clothing. Small stature reflecting her youth as Kicker's younger sister.

data.name: Coby Hansen (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Caucasian teenage boy with brown hair and a mechanical aptitude reflected in his tool-carrying vest. Wears a red and white outfit with work gloves. Athletic build.

data.name: Bud Hansen (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Young Caucasian boy with messy blond hair and an enthusiastic expression. Smaller and younger than Coby, wearing casual clothes with a playful, energetic demeanor.

data.name: Lori Jimenez (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Teenage girl with long dark hair and a confident demeanor. Wears a blue and white outfit. Close bond with Override reflected in her adventurous, determined personality.

data.name: Professor Lucy Suzuki (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Japanese woman with short dark hair and glasses, wearing professional attire. Academic appearance with a determined, inquisitive expression befitting a scientist.

data.name: Vector Prime (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Ancient gold and teal Cybertronic spacecraft robot with an ornate, regal design. Features a long beard-like chin guard, elaborate shoulder armor with wing elements, and a timeless, dignified appearance. Wields the Rhisling sword.

data.name: Override (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Red and white futuristic race car robot with a sleek, aerodynamic frame. Features prominent spoiler elements on the back, racing-styled armor, and a feminine but powerful design. Leader of Velocitron.

data.name: Brakedown (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Tan and brown Velocitronian dragster robot with a weathered, elderly appearance. Features oversized exhaust pipes on the back, drag racing elements, and a hunched posture masking formidable racing abilities.

data.name: Clocker (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and white Velocitronian open-topped race car robot with a youthful, eager design. Features roll hoop elements on the shoulders, racing stripe detailing, and an enthusiastic expression.

data.name: Ransack (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Red and black Velocitronian motorcycle robot with a compact, scrappy frame. Features motorcycle wheel elements on the back, handlebars visible on the shoulders, and a cunning, scheming expression.

data.name: Crumplezone (Cybertron Cartoon)
data.description: Large green and brown three-wheeled Velocitronian rocket car robot with a massive, top-heavy frame. Features a single large front wheel element and two rear rocket pods. Bulky and powerful but dim-witted looking.

data.name: Dirt Boss (Cybertron Cartoon)
data.description: Brown and orange Velocitronian pickup truck robot with a rugged, off-road racing design. Features oversized off-road tires, roll cage elements, and a tough, independent aesthetic from the baja sector.

data.name: Buzzsaw (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Green and gray Cybertronian helicopter robot with a stocky frame. Features helicopter rotor elements and a microphone-wielding announcer persona for Velocitron's racing events.

data.name: Scourge (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Large black and red robotic dragon with imposing wings, sharp claws, and a fearsome horned head. In robot mode, features dragon head elements on the chest, wing cape, and a powerful, tyrannical stance. Leader of Jungle Planet.

data.name: Backstop (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Gray and brown robotic rhinoceros with a wise, elder appearance. Features a prominent horn, thick armored hide, and in robot mode shows a calm, mentor-like demeanor with rhinoceros elements across the torso.

data.name: Snarl (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: White and blue robotic wolf with a lean, agile frame. Features sharp fangs, pointed ears, and in robot mode displays wolf head elements on the chest with a skilled warrior's confident stance.

data.name: Undermine (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Dark green and purple robotic spinosaurus with a sail-backed spine and long snapping jaws. Stealthy, predatory design with a sinister robot mode featuring the dinosaur head as a shoulder element.

data.name: Brimstone (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Dark red and gray robotic pteranodon with broad leathery wings and a sharp beak. In robot mode features wing elements as a cape and pteranodon head on the chest. Brutish, thuggish appearance.

data.name: Metroplex (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Enormous green and orange Gigantion bucket-wheel excavator robot. Towering frame with a massive rotating bucket-wheel on one arm, construction vehicle treads for legs, and a calm, gentle giant demeanor despite his immense size.

data.name: Quickmix (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Orange and gray Cybertronic cement mixer robot with a sturdy, workmanlike frame. Features a rotating cement mixer drum on the back and construction-grade armor plating. Cautious expression befitting Metroplex's right-hand mech.

data.name: Menasor (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Dark yellow and gray Cybertronic excavation machine robot with a powerful, disgruntled appearance. Features drill and excavation tool elements, heavy industrial armor, and an angry expression reflecting his resentment of Gigantion's social structure.

data.name: Evac (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Red and white Eurocopter Dauphin rescue helicopter robot with a heroic, guardian-like design. Features helicopter rotor blades on the back, rescue winch elements, and red cross insignia on the shoulders.

data.name: Crosswise (Cybertron Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and silver Bugatti Veyron-style sports car robot with a sleek, sophisticated frame. Features prominent headlight elements on the chest, aerodynamic bodywork panels, and a professional monster-hunter aesthetic.

data.name: Thundercracker (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Dark blue and gray Sukhoi Su-37 fighter jet robot with a lean, aggressive frame. Features canard wing elements on the chest, thrust-vectoring nozzles visible on the back, and a menacing military jet aesthetic.

data.name: Thunderblast (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Purple and white speedboat robot with a feminine, curvaceous design. Features boat hull elements on the chest, hydrofoil fins on the legs, and a flirtatious, power-seeking expression.

data.name: Mudflap (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Yellow and brown crane truck robot with a muscular, brawler frame. Features a crane boom arm, heavy construction vehicle elements, and clenched fists reflecting his anger issues and boxing background.

data.name: Lugnutz (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Black and chrome Harley-Davidson-style touring motorcycle robot with a lean, wanderer aesthetic. Features motorcycle saddlebag elements on the hips, handlebars on the shoulders, and a free-spirited road warrior design.

data.name: Soundwave (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Dark blue and black Cybertronic stealth bomber robot with a sinister, angular design. Features F-117A Nighthawk-style faceted stealth panels, a visor covering the eyes, and sound wave emitter devices on the arms.

data.name: Laserbeak (Cybertron) (Cybertron Cartoon)
data.description: Dark purple and silver hexagonal bomb that transforms into a robotic condor. Sleek avian form with angular stealth-inspired wing design, serving as Soundwave's drone partner and reconnaissance unit.

data.name: Primus (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Colossal golden and silver deity-Transformer who transforms into the planet Cybertron itself. In robot mode, features an immense armored frame with planet surface details, glowing blue eyes, and an awe-inspiring divine presence.

data.name: Jolt (Cybertron) (Cybertron Cartoon)
data.description: Small blue and white Mini-Con with helicopter elements from Gigantion. Compact humanoid form with rotor blades on the back and a geeky, curious demeanor reflected in oversized optic sensors.

data.name: Reverb (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small red and silver Mini-Con with a Cadillac Escalade EXT-style pickup truck alternate mode. Compact robot form with truck bed elements on the back and an adventurous, daring stance.

data.name: Six-Speed (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small white and blue Mini-Con with a Toyota GT-One Le Mans-style race car alternate mode. Low-slung, aerodynamic robot form with prominent rear wing elements and a curious, sensitive demeanor.

data.name: Drill Bit (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small gray and orange Mini-Con with a twin-drill machine alternate mode. Compact robot form with rotating drill elements on the arms and a dutiful, worker-oriented design befitting Metroplex's attendant.

data.name: Heavy Load (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Small yellow and gray Mini-Con with a Cybertronic dump truck alternate mode. Stocky robot form with a dump bed on the back and a wise, moral-compass demeanor as Menasor's conscience.

data.name: Signal Lancer (Unicron Trilogy Cartoon)
data.description: Red, yellow, and green traffic light robot with a tall, narrow frame. Features traffic signal elements across the body and a quirky, unconventional design reflecting his unusual Earth-based disguise.
